notes: 修复:切换界面语言时卡片内文案实时重译;卡片头部套餐徽章与订阅/付款各行左缘对齐;日期跟随界面语言显示(英文环境不再出现中文年月日)。更新后如提示重新授权钥匙串,属未签名正常现象。
notes_en: Fixes: card text now re-translates instantly when you switch the UI language; the plan badge and header rows are left-aligned; dates follow the UI language (no more Chinese date format in English). If macOS re-prompts for Keychain access after updating, that's expected for an unsigned build.
